input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.6.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.6.4
            TITLE: positive temperature coefficient (ptc) devices must not be used to limit current for the

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.6.4: Positive Temperature Coefficient (PTC) devices must not be used to limit current for the
EV.5.6.4 Positive Temperature Coefficient (PTC) devices must not be used to limit current for the 
Precharge Circuit or Discharge Circuit

final_answer: Positive Temperature Coefficient (PTC) devices must not be used to limit current for the Precharge Circuit or Discharge Circuit
